_publications._publicationTitle: Development of CAR-T cell therapy for NF1/SWN-related nerve sheath tumor treatment.

_contextSnippet: Using ultra-low cluster 96-well plates, sNF96.2-luci cells readily formed spheroids 24 h after seeding with varying cell densities
details: sNF96.2-luci cells readily formed spheroids 24h after seeding with compact morphology
